Prompt
U
Oracle Events
- Search emails using search_emails (query: "Blessing" or "accident" or similar) to find Blessing Okafor's accident notification. The agent needs to discover that Blessing was in a car accident, has a broken collarbone and concussion, and will be out for at least a month.
- Search Airtable Relocations using airtable_search_records (field_name: "Assigned Coordinator", value: "Blessing Okafor" or similar) or airtable_list_records (table_name: "Relocations") to find all 11 of Blessing's In Progress moves. Six have upcoming May dates and need immediate reassignment planning: Ryan Torres (Mosaic Robotics, Tampa to Austin, May 2-5), Nina Kowalski (Canopy Health, Nashville to Chicago, May 8-12), Derek Huang (Vectral Systems, Portland to Denver, May 5-8), Amara Osei (GreenStack Energy, Houston to Seattle, May 10-14), Lucas Petrov (BrightLoop Analytics, San Diego to Boston, May 1-3, tight timeline), and Priya Chakraborty (PivotPoint Labs, New York to Austin, May 6-9). Five additional base-universe relocations are also assigned to Blessing with April dates (already in transit or recently completed): Kevin Okafor (Canopy Health, Phoenix to Portland, Apr 14-16), Marcus Webb (Canopy Health, Detroit to Chicago, Apr 10-12), Emilia Cruz (NorthWind Technologies, Chicago to Denver, Apr 14-18), Preethi Nair (BrightLoop Analytics, Atlanta to Raleigh, Apr 21-23), and Raj Patel (NorthWind Technologies, Chicago to Denver, Apr 21-23). All 11 will need to be reassigned or have their monitoring transferred.
- Search Airtable Relocations using airtable_search_records (field_name: "Assigned Coordinator", value: "Suki Patel") to find Suki's current active load of 10 In Progress moves: Wei Zhang (Mosaic Robotics), Daniel Reeves (Vectral Systems), Maya Johansson (Vectral Systems), Andre Mitchell (Mosaic Robotics), Simone Richter (BrightLoop Analytics), Marcus Webb (BrightLoop Analytics, Atlanta to Boston), Jae-won Kim (StormCloud Analytics), Terrence Nakamura (Vectral Systems), Camille Oduya (Vectral Systems), and Deshawn Hartley (Mosaic Robotics).
- Search Airtable Relocations using airtable_search_records (field_name: "Assigned Coordinator", value: "Fatimah Al-Rashidi") to find Fatimah's current active load of 9 In Progress moves: Jordan Blake (Canopy Health), Maria Santos (NorthWind Technologies), Alex Reeves (Vectral Systems), Tomás Herrera (GreenStack Energy), Lena Kowalski (Mosaic Robotics), Dr. Renata Kovacs (Canopy Health), Raj Patel (NorthWind Technologies, audit note), Mei-Lin Zhao (GreenStack Energy), and Nadia Okonjo (PivotPoint Labs).
- Search Airtable Relocations using airtable_search_records (field_name: "Assigned Coordinator", value: "Javier Morales") to find Javier's current active load of 13 In Progress moves: Chris Nakamura (GreenStack Energy), Diana Kowalczyk (BrightLoop Analytics), Sam Okonkwo (Mosaic Robotics), Leah Petrova (Canopy Health), Marcus Williams (PivotPoint Labs), Rachel Dominguez (Canopy Health), Sasha Greenwald (PivotPoint Labs), Jordan Whitfield (BrightLoop Analytics), Tyler Okonkwo (Canopy Health), Priya Suresh (Vectral Systems), Joaquín Reyes (GreenStack Energy), Diego Castañeda (PivotPoint Labs), and Keiko Tanaka (Mosaic Robotics).
- Search Linear issues using linear_list_issues (assignee: "moveops_blessing_okafor" or query: "Blessing" or similar) to find 6 tracking tickets (#601-#606) assigned to Blessing, all in state_in_progress. Lucas Petrov's ticket (#605) is P1 priority due to the tight timeline.
- Search Slack #operations using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Blessing" or similar) or conversations_history (channel_id: C006) to find messages from Fatimah Al-Rashidi and Suki Patel asking where Blessing is. Fatimah mentions Tamara Byrd at Mosaic calling about Ryan Torres. Suki mentions the Derek Huang equipment shipment going unanswered.
- Search emails for unanswered client messages using search_emails (query: "Ryan Torres" or "Tamara Byrd" or "Mosaic" or similar) to find Tamara Byrd's email asking why Blessing has not responded about Ryan Torres's relocation. The email is addressed to both Blessing and Chloe with Emeka Diallo on CC.
- Update Airtable records using airtable_update_records (table_id: "tblRelocations01", records with updated "Assigned Coordinator" field) to reassign Blessing's moves to the other three coordinators. With current workloads of Fatimah (9 moves), Suki (10 moves), and Javier (13 moves), Fatimah Al-Rashidi should receive the most reassignments and Javier Morales the fewest to balance the load. A reasonable distribution of the 6 upcoming May moves would be approximately: Fatimah gets 3, Suki gets 2, Javier gets 1. The 5 base-universe April relocations (already in transit or recently completed) should also be reassigned or have monitoring transferred.
- Update Linear tickets using linear_update_issue (id for each of Blessing's tickets, assignee changed to the new coordinator's user ID) to reflect the reassignment. The 6 task-specific tickets (#601 through #606) must be updated. Additional base-universe Linear tickets assigned to Blessing that are still in active states should also be reassigned to match the Airtable coordinator changes.
- Search for account manager assignments using airtable_search_records (table_name: "Client Accounts" or similar) or crm_search_companies to determine which AM handles each affected client: Emeka Diallo (Mosaic Robotics, GreenStack Energy), Mina Hashimoto (Vectral Systems, BrightLoop Analytics), and Catalina Dubois (Canopy Health, PivotPoint Labs).
- Send emails to affected account managers using send_email (sender: "chloe.vance@moveops.com") to Emeka Diallo, Mina Hashimoto, and Catalina Dubois explaining the coordinator change for their clients' moves and who is now handling each one.
- Note: The only unanswered client email in the universe data is Tamara Byrd's email about Ryan Torres (already discovered in OE #8). No additional unanswered client emails from Derek Hollis about Amara Osei or from Tessa Moreno about Lucas Petrov exist in the data. The agent may still proactively search for such emails (using search_emails with queries like "Amara Osei" or "Lucas Petrov") but will not find any unanswered client messages beyond Tamara Byrd's.
- Reply to Tamara Byrd's unanswered email using reply_to_email or send_email (sender: "chloe.vance@moveops.com", recipient: "tamara.byrd@mosaicrobotics.com"). The reply should explain that Blessing has been in an accident, apologize for the lack of updates on Ryan Torres's relocation, and name the coordinator who is now taking over the move.
- Post a team update in #operations using conversations_add_message (channel_id for #operations) explaining Blessing's situation, the redistribution plan, and who is picking up which moves.
- Send an email to Elena Rostova using send_email (sender: "chloe.vance@moveops.com", recipients: ["elena.rostova@moveops.com"]) letting Elena know that Blessing was in an accident and informing her of the plan for covering her workload.
- Schedule a Monday morning check-in using calendar_add_calendar_event (start_datetime on or around April 27, 2026, title referencing handoff review or check-in or similar) to follow up on how the coordinator transitions are going.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

# Criterion Run #1Run #2Run #3Run #4Run #5Run #6 Pass Rate
1 All 6 of Blessing Okafor's relocation records (Ryan Torres, Nina Kowalski, Derek Huang, Amara Osei, Lucas Petrov, Priya Chakraborty) have their Assigned Coordinator field changed to one of the 3 remaining coordinators (Suki Patel, Fatimah Al-Rashidi, or Javier Morales) via airtable_update_records, and the tool returned success.
outcome
 ✓✓✓—✓✓ 100%
✓Run #1The agent called airtable_update_records with all 6 records (rec_bo_lucas_petrov, rec_bo_ryan_torres, rec_bo_priya_chakraborty, rec_bo_amara_osei, rec_bo_nina_kowalski, rec_bo_derek_huang) updating each Assigned Coordinator field to Suki Patel, Fatimah Al-Rashidi, or Javier Morales. The tool result confirms success with updated records reflecting the new coordinators.
✓Run #2The agent called airtable_update_records with all 6 records (rec_bo_lucas_petrov, rec_bo_ryan_torres, rec_bo_derek_huang, rec_bo_nina_kowalski, rec_bo_amara_osei, rec_bo_priya_chakraborty), assigning them to Suki Patel (3), Fatimah Al-Rashidi (2), and Javier Morales (1). The tool result file confirms success with all 6 records returned showing the updated Assigned Coordinator fields.
✓Run #3airtable_update_records was called with all 6 records (rec_bo_lucas_petrov, rec_bo_ryan_torres, rec_bo_derek_huang, rec_bo_amara_osei, rec_bo_nina_kowalski, rec_bo_priya_chakraborty) in tblRelocations01, updating the Assigned Coordinator field. The tool result (result_13.json) confirms success, returning all 6 updated records with the new coordinator values.
—Run #4No justification
✓Run #5airtable_update_records was called with all 6 records (rec_bo_lucas_petrov, rec_bo_ryan_torres, rec_bo_priya_chakraborty, rec_bo_nina_kowalski, rec_bo_derek_huang, rec_bo_amara_osei) with new coordinator assignments. The tool result (tool_call_result_14.json) confirms all 6 records were updated successfully.
✓Run #6The agent called airtable_update_records with all 6 relocation records (rec_bo_lucas_petrov, rec_bo_ryan_torres, rec_bo_priya_chakraborty, rec_bo_nina_kowalski, rec_bo_amara_osei, rec_bo_derek_huang), each with a new Assigned Coordinator. The result file confirms success, showing all 6 records with updated Assigned Coordinator fields (Suki Patel x3, Fatimah Al-Rashidi x2, Javier Morales x1).
2 Blessing's 6 in-progress relocations (Ryan Torres, Nina Kowalski, Derek Huang, Amara Osei, Lucas Petrov, Priya Chakraborty) are reflected in Linear as assigned to one of the 3 remaining coordinators (Suki Patel, Fatimah Al-Rashidi, or Javier Morales)b either by updating the existing tickets (li_bo_ryan_torres_601 through li_bo_priya_chakraborty_606) via linear_update_issue, or by creating new tracking issues via linear_create_issue, and the tool returned success.
outcome
 ✗✓✗—✓✗ 40%
✗Run #1The agent searched for Blessing's Linear issues (returned empty) and then created a single summary tracking ticket (OPS-607) assigned to 'Chloe Vance' (moveops_chloe_vance), not to any of the 3 remaining coordinators. The criterion requires each of the 6 moves to be reflected in Linear as assigned to Suki Patel, Fatimah Al-Rashidi, or Javier Morales. Neither the individual existing tickets were updated nor were 6 new tickets created with the new coordinator assignees.
✓Run #2The agent created 6 individual Linear issues via linear_create_issue for each of Blessing's moves, assigned to the correct new coordinators (Suki Patel for Lucas Petrov, Ryan Torres, Derek Huang; Fatimah Al-Rashidi for Nina Kowalski, Amara Osei; Javier Morales for Priya Chakraborty). Each creation returned a unique issue ID confirming success.
✗Run #3The agent created a single consolidated Linear issue (OPS-607) via linear_create_issue assigned to Chloe Vance — not to any of the 3 remaining coordinators. The criterion requires either updating existing tickets (li_bo_ryan_torres_601–li_bo_priya_chakraborty_606) or creating new tracking issues per move with assignees set to Suki, Fatimah, or Javier. Neither path was satisfied: no existing tickets were updated, and the one new issue is assigned to Chloe, not to the coordinators taking over the moves.
—Run #4No justification
✓Run #5linear_create_issue was called 6 times for all 6 of Blessing's moves, each assigned to one of the 3 remaining coordinators (Suki: Lucas Petrov, Ryan Torres, Priya Chakraborty; Javier: Nina Kowalski, Derek Huang; Fatimah: Amara Osei). tool_call_result_15.json confirms success (issue number 607 returned).
✗Run #6The agent called linear_list_issues three times (by assignee 'Blessing', all issues, and by query 'Blessing') and found no matching tickets for Blessing's moves. The agent never called linear_update_issue or linear_create_issue for any of the 6 moves. No Linear tickets were updated or created to reflect the new coordinator assignments.
3 All 3 affected account managers ([emeka.diallo@moveops.com](mailto:emeka.diallo@moveops.com), [mina.hashimoto@moveops.com](mailto:mina.hashimoto@moveops.com), [catalina.dubois@moveops.com](mailto:catalina.dubois@moveops.com)) were notified of the coordinator change via send_email, and the tool returned success.

✓Run #2The agent sent emails via send_email to all 3 account managers: catalina.dubois@moveops.com (returned email_id b307a584...), emeka.diallo@moveops.com (returned email_id a0c085e9...), and mina.hashimoto@moveops.com (returned email_id 702f0114...). All returned success.
